mapper.insert:
SELECT "ISEQ$$_78846".CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOOK_REQUEST (CUSTOMER_ID, ISBN, BOOK_TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, THUMBNAIL_URL) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{isbn}, #{bookTitle}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{thumbnailUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT BR.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM BOOK_REQUEST BR JOIN USERS U ON BR.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID WHERE BR.ID = #{id}
SELECT BR.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM BOOK_REQUEST BR JOIN USERS U ON BR.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID WHERE BR.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY BR.CREATED_AT DESC
SELECT BR.*, U.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME FROM BOOK_REQUEST BR JOIN USERS U ON BR.CUSTOMER_ID = U.ID ORDER BY BR.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK_REQUEST SET STATUS = #{status}, ADMIN_COMMENT = #{adminComment}, PROCESSED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
